title: Supply Chain Manager - CONCOR - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - CONCOR - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Supply Chain Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!
